---
title: "Trigger Mapping"
format: html
---

# Trigger Mapping

Use this worksheet to identify possible triggers at a place you expect to encounter alcohol (such as a bar, restaurant, party, or social gathering). It will help you recognize patterns in your thoughts, feelings, and behaviors so you can prepare effective coping strategies and reduce your risk of relapse.

![](https://github.com/jjcurtin/aud_support/blob/main/modules/images/map.jpg?raw=true){fig-align="center"}


## 1. Situation / Context

Describe where you were and what was happening.

-   **Date & Time:**\
-   **Location:**\
-   **Who were you with:**\
-   **What was happening:**

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 2. Trigger Type

Select all that apply:

-   [ ] Social (friends, parties, bars)\
-   [ ] Emotional (stress, anxiety, boredom, sadness)\
-   [ ] Environmental (smell, music, location)\
-   [ ] Routine/Habit (after work, weekends, celebrations)\
-   [ ] Thought-based (e.g., “I deserve a drink”)\
-   [ ] Other: \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 3. Thoughts in the Moment

What went through your mind?

> 

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 4. Feelings (Rate 0–10)

| Emotion | Rating (0–10) |
|---------|---------------|
|         |               |
|         |               |
|         |               |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 5. Urge Level

-   Rate your urge to drink (0–10): **\_\_\_\_\_**

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 6. What You Did

Select one or more:

-   [ ] Drank alcohol\
-   [ ] Did not drink\
-   [ ] Left situation\
-   [ ] Used coping skill\
-   [ ] Other: \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

Describe briefly:

> 

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 7. Coping Strategies Used

Select any that apply:

-   [ ] Called/texted someone\

-   [ ] Had a non-alcoholic drink\

-   [ ] Left early\

-   [ ] Distracted myself\

-   [ ] Urge surfing\

-   [ ] Deep breathing\

-   [ ] Other: \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

-   **Effectiveness (0–10):** \_\_\_\_\_

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 8. Outcome

-   **How did you feel afterward?**

> 

-   **Any consequences (positive or negative)?**

> 

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 9. What Helped / What Didn’t

### What helped:

> 

### What didn’t help:

> 

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: callout
## 10. Plan for Next Time

```         
1.  


2.  


3.  
```
:::
